LAB 7: THE CARDIOVASCULAR SYSTEM HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 93

94 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 7: THE CARDIOVASCULAR SYSTEM MEASURABLE OUTCOMES • Visually identify major components, vessels, and structures of a dissected heart. • Determine the anatomical structures of the heart on available models. • Determine the pathway of blood flow through the heart. • List and accurately classify the distinct types of blood cells from histological slides. • Recognize the features of cardiac tissue under a microscope. • Identify the major blood vessels required for this lab. • D
